title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 160.012 - Delayed effective date
text:
160.012.  Delayed effective date. — The repeal and reenactment of sections 160.011, 160.041, 163.021, 171.031, and 171.033 of this act* shall become effective July 1, 2026.
(L. 2024 S.B. 727 § B) 
* "This act" (S.B. 727, 2024) contained numerous sections. Consult Disposition of Sections table for a definitive listing.
